title: Headwinds For Chinese Coal Import Prospects
section_path: Headwinds For Chinese Coal Import Prospects
section_path_text: Headwinds For Chinese Coal Import Prospects
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
China produced a record 402.7 million tons of coal last month. As we have been stressing in our Weekly Dry Bulk Reports and Weekly China Reports, the government last year was no longer primarily focused on improving mine safety and instead shifted its focus to ensuring robust coal production. Overall, this has led to a significant change.
